name: ECML14-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to the east coast mainline rail route from London (Kings Cross) via Newcastle to Edinburgh.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2024 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / ECML14 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89 to ECML14-IRF (1) (code 10624) used in conjunction with the ECML14-TM map projection (code 10625).
